name: Orange-Bourbon Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 whole chicken breasts, halved, boned, skinned
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large heavy oven-proof skillet, melt the butter and let it cool, but do not let it solidify completely.
3. Turn the chicken in the butter so that it is well-coated on all sides.
4. Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
5. Tuck the edges of the chicken under itself to form a compact shape about 4 cm thick.
6. Place the chicken, skin-side up, in the skillet.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 15 minutes, basting occasionally.
8. In a separate pan, sauté the almonds in butter until lightly toasted and sprinkle with salt. Allow to cool until crisp.
8. Remove the chicken from the skillet and place it on warm serving plates; keep warm.
9. Add the orange-juice concentrate to the drippings in the skillet and stir over high heat until reduced by one-third.
10. Stir in the bourbon, then heat through.
11. Stir in the remaining salt and pepper, and pour the sauce over the chicken.
12. Sprinkle with the almonds before serving.
